The download window is limited - typically a short period - so act quickly before the link deactivates.

Key Highlights:

  • Release Date: February 17, 2026
  • Last Date to Download: March 1, 2026 (till 6:00 PM)
  • Access: Online only via ssc.gov.in login
  • Purpose: View final marks, compare with cut-offs, and save for records/joining

SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 Overview

Particular Details
Exam Name Constable (GD) in CAPFs, SSF, NIA, Rifleman (GD) in Assam Rifles, and Sepoy in NCB Examination 2025
Conducting Body Staff Selection Commission (SSC)
Final Result Status Declared on January 15, 2026
Scorecard Status Released on February 17, 2026
Mode of Scorecard Online only
Login Credentials Registration number / Username and Password (plus captcha if required)
Official Website ssc.gov.in

Visit the Staff Selection Commission (SSC) official website – ssc.gov.in

Important Dates: SSC GD Final Result and Scorecard 2025

Event Date/Details
CBT Exam Dates February 4 to 25, 2025
PET/PST and Medical Stages Conducted post-CBT shortlisting
Final Result Declaration January 15, 2026
Final Scorecard Release February 17, 2026
Last Date to Download Scorecard March 1, 2026 (6:00 PM)

Direct Link to Check SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Candidates can access the SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 through the direct link on the SSC portal under the “Result/Marks” section after logging in. The portal may redirect from legacy links, but use ssc.gov.in primarily.

SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 – Direct Link (Active)
(Login required at ssc.gov.in for marks download)

Step-by-Step Guide to Download SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

  1. Visit the official Staff Selection Commission website: ssc.gov.in.
  2. Click on the “Login” or “Candidate Login” button on the homepage.
  3. Enter your registration number/username, password, and captcha (if prompted).
  4. After logging in, navigate to the “Result/Marks” tab on your dashboard.
  5. Select “Constable (GD) in CAPFs, SSF, NIA and Rifleman (GD) in Assam Rifles Examination 2025” from the list.
  6. Click on the “SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025” or “Marks” link to view your details.
  7. Your final scorecard will display on screen - review marks, cut-off comparison, and status.
  8. Download the PDF and print it for future reference (e.g., document verification). Save it promptly, as access ends after the deadline.
  9. (Use the direct link mentioned above to reach the login faster if available.)

Details Mentioned on SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Your scorecard typically includes:

  • Candidate’s name, roll number, registration number
  • Category/sub-category (UR, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, etc.)
  • Exam name and applied post
  • Section-wise marks (General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Knowledge & General Awareness, Elementary Mathematics, English/Hindi)
  • Raw and normalized marks
  • Total marks in CBT (considered for final merit after qualifying PET/PST and medical)
  • Qualifying status (selected/not selected) and any remarks
  • Note on limited availability window

SSC GD Final Cut Off and Merit List 2025

The SSC GD final cut off 2025 was released with the final result on January 15, 2026, and is force-wise, state-wise, category-wise, and gender-wise. It appears in the official result PDF write-up.

Your scorecard marks should be compared to the relevant cut-off for your category/force/state to assess selection. The merit list PDF lists roll numbers of provisionally selected candidates (around 50,047 selected against vacancies), while the scorecard provides individual marks for those who reached physical/medical stages.

(Refer to the official SSC result PDFs for exact cut-off tables - examples range from ~104 to 152+ depending on category/force.)

What to Do After Downloading SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Selected candidates: Keep multiple printouts/PDFs of the scorecard and final result for document verification, joining, and force allocation.

Verify details (name, roll number, category, etc.) - report serious discrepancies to SSC regional offices promptly.

Non-selected candidates: Use marks for performance analysis and preparation for future SSC exams.

Download and save copies early - the window closes after the last date.

SSC GD Selection Process 2025 (Short Overview)

The process included:

  • Computer-Based Test (CBT): Four sections totaling 160 marks.
  • Physical Efficiency Test (PET) and Physical Standard Test (PST): Qualifying.
  • Detailed Medical Examination (DME)/Review Medical Examination (RME): Qualifying.
  • Final merit based on normalized CBT marks (for qualified candidates), followed by force/state allocation per vacancies and preferences.

The final scorecard reflects CBT performance post-qualifying stages, available briefly post-result.

Important Links for SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

  • SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 Download: ssc.gov.in (login to Result/Marks)
  • SSC GD Final Result 2025 Merit List PDF: Available on ssc.gov.in under Results
  • SSC GD Final Cut Off 2025 PDF: In final result write-up on ssc.gov.in
  • SSC Official Website: ssc.gov.in

  2. Step 2: Check Inbox and Spam / Junk folder for email from NSRY / Naval Base Kochi
  3. Step 3: Look for subject related to "Apprentice Call Letter", "Written Exam" or "AT/01/5030/RTG"

Particulars Details
Exam Date 26 May 2026 (Monday)
Reporting Time 08:00 Hrs
Venue Parking Area beside Travancore Gate, Naval Base, Kochi 682004
Exam Mode OMR Based Written Test (MCQ) + Interview
Total Marks 75 Marks

Subject Marks
English 10

Not Allowed:

  • Bags, Study materials

Before Exam Day:

  • Reach venue well in advance (No entry after reporting time)
  • Arrange your own boarding/lodging and food
  • Keep Call Letter and documents ready

On Exam Day:

  • Report by 08:00 Hrs at Travancore Gate area
  • Follow all Navy security instructions strictly
  • Carry black/blue ball pen, pencil, writing pad
  • Physically handicapped candidates may bring helper with permission

What If Call Letter Not Received?

If you have not received the NSRY Kochi Apprentice Call Letter 2026:

  1. Check Spam/Junk folder thoroughly
  2. Wait for 1-2 days as emails are being sent in batches
  3. Contact Apprentice Training School, NSRY Kochi via official channels
  4. Keep checking updates on AnilSirITI.in or official Navy sources

RRB ALP Recruitment 2026 Notification Released: Railway Recruitment Boards have announced CEN 01/2026 for 11,127 Assistant Loco Pilot vacancies across Indian Railways with a starting salary of ₹19,900 per month (Level 2, 7th CPC). 

FOLLOW US

This bumper railway vacancy is a major opportunity for candidates preparing for latest Railway Govt Jobs as well as state-wise railway jobs, because applications for RRB ALP Recruitment 2026 can be submitted online for any participating RRB including Ahmedabad, Chennai, Kolkata, Mumbai, Secunderabad and others.

Candidates aged 18-30 years can apply online from 15 May to 14 June 2026 through rrbapply.gov.in.

RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Recruitment 2026 Overview

Company Name Indian Railways – Railway Recruitment Boards (RRB)
Post Name Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP)
No of Posts 11,127 (All Railways)
Advt No CEN No. 01/2026
Salary Pay Level-2 as per 7th CPC | Initial Pay: ₹19,900/- Per Month
Qualification As per Detailed CEN No. 01/2026 (Post-wise Education Qualification & Medical Standard)
Age Limit 18 to 30 Years (as on 01.07.2026)
Start Date for Apply 15-05-2026
Last Date for Apply 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs)
Official Website rrbapply.gov.in

RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF

Candidates who are interested in applying for the RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

Download RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Job 2026 Short Notification PDF

Latest Railway Job Notifications 2026

RRC Western Railway Apprentice 2026 - 5349 Posts | Apply Online
South Central Railway Apprentice 2026 - 2801 Posts | Apply Online
MMRDA Recruitment 2026 - 235 AE, JE & More Posts | Apply Now
KRCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - 190 Posts | Apply Online
Rail Wheel Factory Apprentice 2026 - 192 Posts | Apply Offline

RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details

Post Name Total Vacancies (All Railways)
Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) 11,127

Eligibility Criteria

  • Qualifications: As per the detailed CEN No. 01/2026. Post-wise Education Qualification and Medical Standards will be published exclusively on the official websites of the participating RRBs.
  • Age Limit: 18 to 30 years as on 01.07.2026. Age relaxation as per Railway rules will be applicable as mentioned in the detailed CEN.
  • Candidates are advised to verify their primary details using Aadhaar during filing of the online application to avoid inconvenience and delays due to special detailed scrutiny at every stage of recruitment process for Non-Aadhaar verified applications.
  • Name and Date of Birth in Aadhaar shall be updated to match 100% with the Full Name and Date of Birth available in the 10th class pass certificate. Aadhaar also needs to be updated with the latest photo and latest biometrics (Fingerprint & Iris) before filling the online application.
  • All terms, conditions, eligibility criteria, procedures and other requirements governing the recruitment shall be strictly as per the detailed CEN No. 01/2026 (along with any corrigendum) to be published on the official websites of the RRBs.

Salary / Stipend

  • Post: Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP)
  • Pay Level: Level-2 as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix
  • Initial Pay: ₹19,900/- per month
  • Other allowances and benefits as applicable to Railway employees under 7th CPC will be as per detailed CEN No. 01/2026.

Age Limit (as on 01-07-2026)

  • Minimum Age: 18 Years
  • Maximum Age: 30 Years
  • Age is reckoned as on 01.07.2026.
  • Age relaxation for SC/ST, OBC, Ex-Servicemen, PwBD and other eligible categories will be as per Railway rules mentioned in the detailed CEN No. 01/2026.

Application Fee

  • Application fee details are not mentioned in this Indicative (Short) Notification. Fee details will be published in the detailed CEN No. 01/2026 on the official websites of the participating RRBs.
  • Applications must be submitted through Online Mode Only at https://www.rrbapply.gov.in.

Important Dates

Event Date
Notification (Indicative) Publication Date 21-03-2026
Opening Date of Application 15-05-2026
Closing Date for Submission of Application 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs)

How to Apply

  • Applications must be submitted Through Online Mode Only. Visit https://www.rrbapply.gov.in to fill and submit the online application form.
  • The Opening Date of Application is 15-05-2026 and the Closing Date is 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs).
  • Before filling the application, ensure that your Aadhaar details (Name and Date of Birth) match 100% with your 10th class pass certificate and that Aadhaar is updated with the latest photo and biometrics.
  • Candidates of all participating RRBs must apply through the centralized portal: https://www.rrbapply.gov.in.

CRPF Constable Tradesman Recruitment 2026 Overview

The Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF) has officially released a recruitment notification for Constable Tradesman . For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF)

Constable Tradesman Vacancy 2026

  • Exempted for SC, ST, Female (all categories) and Ex-servicemen candidates

Note: Applications received without prescribed fee (where applicable) shall be summarily rejected. No hard copy of application is required to be sent.

CRPF Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

  • Notification Release Date: 08-04-2026
  • Starting Date for Apply Online: 20-04-2026
  • Last Date for Apply Online: 19-05-2026

CRPF Recruitment 2026 Age Limit (as on 01-01-2026)

  • Age Limit for Constable (Driver): 21-27 Years
  • Constable (Motor Mechanic Vehicle / Cobbler / Carpenter / Tailor / Brass Band / Pipe Band / Gardner / Bugler / Painter / Cook / Barber cum Hair Dresser / Washer Man & Women / Water Carrier / Safai Karamchari / Mason / Plumber / Electrician): 18-23 Years
  • Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

Detailed CRPF Tradesman Eligibility Criteria 2026

Qualification

  • Driver: Matriculation + Heavy Transport Vehicle Driving License
  • Motor Mechanic Vehicle: Matriculation + 2 years ITI in Mechanic Motor Vehicle + 1 year experience
  • All other Tradesmen: Matriculation + proficient in respective trade
  • Pioneer Wing (Mason/Electrician): Matriculation + 1 year experience in trade (ITI preferred)

Detailed CRPF Tradesman Eligibility Criteria 2026

Selection Process

The recruitment process will consist of Physical Efficiency Test (PET), Physical Standards Test (PST), Computer Based Test (CBT), Trade/Skill Test, Document Verification (DV) and Medical Examination (DME/RME).

  • Physical Efficiency Test (PET): Qualifying in nature.
    • For Constable (Driver, Motor Mechanic Vehicle, Gardner, Painter, Carpenter, Brass Band, Pipe Band, Cobbler, Tailor & Bugler): Male – 5 Kms race in 24 minutes; Female – 1.6 Kms in 8.30 minutes.
    • For Constable (Cook/Water Carrier, Barber & Hair Dresser, Washer man & Washer women, Safai Karmachari): Male – 1.6 Kms in 10 minutes; Female – 1.6 Kms in 12 minutes.
    • For Pioneer Wing (Mason / Electrician): Male – 1.6 Kms in 09 minutes.
    • Pregnant women candidates will be declared temporarily unfit.
  • Physical Standards Test (PST): Height, Chest (for males only) & Weight (proportionate to height & age).
    • Height: Male – 170 Cms (minimum); Female – 157 Cms (minimum). Relaxations applicable for certain categories (ST, NE States, Gorkhas, etc.).
    • Chest (Male only): Un-expanded – 80 Cms, Minimum expansion – 05 Cms. Relaxations applicable.
    • Candidates failing PST will be eliminated.
  • Computer Based Test (CBT): 100 marks (100 MCQs), duration 02 hours.
    • General Intelligence & Reasoning – 25 Qs / 25 Marks
    • General Knowledge & General Awareness – 25 Qs / 25 Marks
    • Elementary Mathematics – 25 Qs / 25 Marks
    • English/Hindi – 25 Qs / 25 Marks
    • Negative marking of 0.25 marks for each wrong answer.
    • Qualifying marks: UR – 30%, EWS/OBC – 25%, SC/ST & others – 20%.
    • Marks will be normalized. Merit list prepared on CBT marks.
  • Trade/Skill Test: Qualifying in nature (50 marks, minimum 20 marks required). Practical assessment of the applied trade/post.
  • Document Verification (DV): Original documents (Matric certificate, Domicile/PRC, Trade certificates, Caste/EWS/ESM certificates, etc.) will be verified.
  • Detailed Medical Examination (DME) / Review Medical Examination (RME): As per Uniform Guidelines issued by MHA. Temporary unfitness allowed only for pregnancy. Final selection subject to medical fitness.
  • Final merit list prepared on the basis of marks obtained in CBT (subject to qualifying all stages). Separate merit lists for male/female and each State/UT (All India basis for Pioneer posts).

How to Apply

Application Mode: Online only through CRPF website. No other mode will be accepted.

Steps to Apply:

  1. Visit the official website www.rect.crpf.gov.in.
  2. Click on the link for “Recruitment for the post of Constable (Technical & Tradesmen and Pioneer) 2026”.
  3. Register by providing basic details and generate Provisional Registration Number & Password.
  4. Fill the online application form carefully (personal details, educational qualification, trade/post applied, State/UT of domicile, etc.).
  5. Upload scanned copies of recent colour passport size photograph, signature, left thumb impression and handwritten declaration as per specifications.
  6. Pay the application fee online (if applicable) through BHIM, UPI, Net Banking, Debit/Credit Card or CSC Wallet.
  7. Submit the application and take printout of the application form & e-receipt for future reference.
  8. Candidates should bring two coloured printouts of the Admit Card at every stage of examination.

Other Terms and Conditions

  • You can take the Aadhaar Supervisor exam through this link: https://uidai.nseitexams.com/UIDAI/LoginAction_input.action
  • When you apply for the exam, an authorization request is sent to the State Team.
  • Once they approve the request, you will be able to appear for the Aadhaar Supervisor exam.
  • You can take the Aadhaar LMS Certification once your LMS ID and Password are created and approved. After that, you will be able to appear for the LMS Certification through this link:   https://e-learning.uidai.gov.in

How to Apply for CSC e‑Governance Services Indian Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026

Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online only through the official CSC e‑Governance Services Indian website. Follow the steps given below to submit your application form.

Visit Official Website

  • Go to the official CSC e‑Governance Services Indian website: csc.gov.in.

  • On the homepage, navigate to the Recruitment/Careers/Latest Opening section.

Open Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Application Link

  • Find and click on the notification/link titled “CSC e‑Governance Services Indian Aadhaar Supervisor/ Operator Recruitment 2026” or similar.

  • Click on the Apply Online button to proceed to the application page.

Registration (New Users)

  • Click on New Registration (if applying for the first time).

  • Enter basic details such as Name, Mobile Number, Email ID, Date of Birth, and create a password.

  • Submit the details to generate your Registration ID and Password (note these for future login).

Login and Fill Application Form

  • Login using your Registration ID and Password.

  • Fill in the online application form carefully with personal details, contact details, educational qualification, Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator certificate details, and preferred state/district.

  • Ensure that all details match your certificates and Aadhaar data.

Upload Documents

  • Upload scanned copies of the following documents in the prescribed format and size (as mentioned in the notification):

    • Recent passport size photograph

    • Signature

    • 10th/12th/ITI/Polytechnic Diploma certificates and mark sheets

    • Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor Certificate issued by UIDAI‑authorized Testing & Certifying Agency

    • Any other documents required as per notification

  • Preview the uploaded documents and confirm that they are clear and readable.

Application Fee Payment (If Applicable)

  • Check the Application Fee section in the official notification.

  • If any fee is prescribed, pay it online through available modes such as Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, or UPI.

  • After successful payment, download/print the fee receipt.

Final Submission

  • Carefully review all the details filled in the application form in the Preview section.

  • If required, make corrections before final submission.

  • Click on Final Submit to complete the application process.

Print Application Form

  • After successful submission, download and take a printout of the final submitted application form for future reference.

  • Keep the Registration ID, Password, and printout safe for further recruitment stages.

C-DAC Thiruvananthapuram Project Staff Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection process for C-DAC Thiruvananthapuram Project Staff Recruitment 2026 consists of initial screening of educational records and online application/form, followed by a Walk-in/Online Interview. Only registered candidates will be allowed to attend the interview. Meeting the minimum eligibility criteria does not entitle any candidate to be called for the interview — C-DAC may limit the number of candidates called based on higher qualifications and experience over the minimum prescribed. Selection will be based on academic qualifications, experience profile, written test scores (if any), interview performance, and other parameters as decided by management.

Stage Process Remarks
Stage 1 Registration via Google Form Mandatory; only registered candidates will be called for interview
Stage 2 Initial Screening of Applications Based on academic records and eligibility declared in application
Stage 3 Walk-in / Online Interview Schedule will be communicated to eligible candidates via registered email; No TA/DA paid
Stage 4 Certificate Verification Selected candidates will be informed via registered email; originals with one set of self-attested photocopies required
Stage 5 Provisional Offer Letter Initially only provisional offer letter issued; final offer letter issued after certificate/document verification clearance

How to Apply for C-DAC Thiruvananthapuram Project Staff Recruitment 2026

Candidates must register their candidature by filling the Google Form available on the official CDAC website below the respective post details, on or before 26-05-2026 by 17:00 hrs. Only registered candidates will be allowed to attend the walk-in/online interview. After registering, candidates must download and fill the prescribed CDAC Application Form and One Page Write-Up (available on the website below the post details) and attach a latest passport size photograph. Hard copies of applications/documents are NOT to be sent to C-DAC; all communications will be via email only. The interview call letter and all correspondence will be sent to the email ID provided in the online application — no hard copy will be sent. All recruitment-related queries should be addressed to [email protected], clearly mentioning the post code and candidate name in the subject line.

For Walk-in Mode - Documents to be carried in original with one set of self-attested photocopies:

  • Duly filled Application Form
  • Duly filled One Page Write-Up (6 copies for walk-in candidates)
  • Valid Photo ID proof with date of birth (PAN card / Aadhaar card / Driving License etc.)
  • No Objection Certificate (NOC) from parent organization — mandatory for candidates working in Central/State Govt./Autonomous Bodies/PSUs

For Online Mode - Documents to be emailed to [email protected] on or before last date of registration:

  • All documents listed above for walk-in mode (scanned copies)
  • Subject line of email must clearly mention Post Code and Name of Candidate

Documents to be submitted at Certificate Verification (selected candidates only, as intimated via registered email):

  • Valid Photo ID proof with date of birth (PAN card / Aadhaar / Driving License etc.)
  • 10th, 12th, and BE/B.Tech/MCA/M.Sc/ME/M.Tech certificates and consolidated mark sheets (as applicable)
  • Experience certificates for the period claimed, clearly mentioning duration of employment, salary received and designation
  • Employment certificate/NOC or any other valid certificate from current employer (as experience proof)
  • Caste certificate for SC/ST; Non-Creamy Layer certificate for OBC (in prescribed DOPT format)
  • Medical certificate (in case of PWD — disability certificate in format prescribed by DOPT OM No. 36035/3/2004-Estt. dated 29/12/2005 as amended; minimum 40% permanent disability)
  • EWS Income and Property Certificate in prescribed DOPT format (for EWS candidates; OM No. 36039/1/2019-Estt. dated 31.01.2019 as amended)
  • CGPA/percentage conversion certificate from university/institution (if CGPA/letter grade system followed)
  • Equivalence certificate from appropriate authority (if equivalence clause is claimed)

Apply / Register at: https://www.cdac.in | Email for Online Mode / Queries: [email protected]

Important Instructions for C-DAC Thiruvananthapuram Project Staff Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Only registered candidates will be allowed to attend the walk-in/online interview — registration via Google Form is mandatory.
  • Candidates must read the full notification and General Terms & Conditions carefully before registering.
  • All qualifications must be from AICTE/UGC approved institutions or recognized universities.
  • Academic/teaching/research work, non-profit organization experience, internships/project work as part of academic curriculum, part-time, daily wage, or visiting/guest faculty experience will NOT be counted as valid experience.
  • Experience will be counted only if supported by proper experience certificate from previous/current employers clearly mentioning duration, salary and designation.
  • C-DAC's decision on experience is final; work experience claimed without supporting documents will not be considered.
  • Salary mentioned is the starting minimum for the given experience range; candidates with more experience will receive additional increment as per C-DAC policy.
  • C-DAC internal candidates must have completed at least 2 years of service at C-DAC as on the notification date to be eligible.
  • Posts are purely on contract basis — no claim or right to regular/permanent appointment at C-DAC will be entertained.
  • Selected candidates may be deployed/transferred to any project location anywhere in India as per organizational requirement.
  • Government/PSU/Autonomous Body employees must produce NOC/Employment Certificate at the time of interview.
  • C-DAC has not authorized any agent/agency for recruitment activities; candidates should not engage with any such entities.
  • No TA/DA will be paid for attending the walk-in/online interview.
  • Any attempt to promote candidature by any means will be treated as disqualification for selection.
  • Internal candidates finally selected will have to resign from current C-DAC service and join the selected post as a new employee.
  • Candidates are advised to visit www.cdac.in regularly for notices, corrigenda, and updates — no individual communication will be made.
  • C-DAC reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of posts, not fill any post, or cancel/restrict/extend the recruitment process at any time without prior notice.

Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Indian Air Force has officially released Advertisement No. 01/2026 for direct recruitment of Group 'C' Civilian Posts at various Air Force Stations/Units under HQ Maintenance Command, HQ Training Command, HQ Central Air Command, HQ Western Air Command, HQ Eastern Air Command, HQ South Western Air Command, HQ Southern Air Command, and Independent Units across India. The notification was published in Employment News (2–8 May 2026) and includes complete details on vacancies, station-wise distribution, eligibility criteria, educational qualifications, age limit, selection process, and offline application procedure. Candidates are strongly advised to download and carefully check the official notification published in Employment News before applying offline. The application must reach the concerned Air Force Station/Unit within 30 days from the date of publication.

  • Download Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 Employment News Notification PDF (Advt. No. 01/2026)

Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organisation Name Indian Air Force (IAF), Ministry of Defence, Government of India
Advertisement No. 01/2026
Post Name Lower Division Clerk (LDC), Hindi Typist, Civilian Mechanical Transport Driver – Ordinary Grade (CMTD)
Post Group Group 'C' Civilian Posts
Total Vacancies 47 Posts (across all Commands and Independent Units)
Pay Scale Level-2 as per Pay Matrix 7th CPC
Application Mode Offline (by post to the concerned Air Force Station/Unit)
Selection Mode Written Test + Skill/Practical/Physical Test (wherever applicable)
Nationality Eligible Indian Citizens only
Official Website https://indianairforce.nic.in/

Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Advertisement Publication Date (Employment News) 02-05-2026 (Employment News 2–8 May 2026)
Last Date for Receipt of Application 30 days from the date of publication (on or before 01-06-2026 approximately)
Crucial Date for Age & Document Validity Last date of receipt of application
Written Test Date To be notified to shortlisted candidates
Skill/Practical/Physical Test Date To be notified to eligible candidates after written test

Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 47 Group 'C' Civilian vacancies have been announced across various Air Force Stations/Units under different Commands and Independent Units of the Indian Air Force. The vacancies are distributed across HQ Maintenance Command, HQ Training Command, HQ Central Air Command, HQ Western Air Command, HQ Eastern Air Command, HQ South Western Air Command, HQ Southern Air Command, and Independent Units. Reservation is applicable as per Government of India norms for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD categories.

Command-wise Total Vacancy Summary

S. No. Command / Unit Total Vacancies
1 HQ Maintenance Command, IAF 14
2 HQ Training Command, IAF 05
3 HQ Central Air Command, IAF 03
4 HQ Western Air Command, IAF 06
5 HQ Eastern Air Command, IAF 06
6 HQ South Western Air Command, IAF 05
7 HQ Southern Air Command, IAF 01
8 Independent Units, IAF 07
Grand Total 47

Post-Wise Vacancy Details

Sl. No. Post Name Pay Scale (7th CPC)
1 Lower Division Clerk (LDC) Level-2 as per Pay Matrix
2 Hindi Typist Level-2 as per Pay Matrix
3 Civilian Mechanical Transport Driver – Ordinary Grade (CMTD) Level-2 as per Pay Matrix

Note: Eligible candidates can apply to any of the Air Force Stations of their choice subject to the vacancies and qualifications. Detailed station-wise vacancy distribution is available in the official Employment News notification PDF.

Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Before applying for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026, candidates must ensure they meet all the prescribed eligibility conditions including educational qualification, experience, and other requirements for the respective post. Only Indian Citizens are eligible to apply. SC/ST/OBC candidates applying against unreserved posts are not entitled to any relaxation in age limit, experience, etc. OBC candidates must submit a certificate stating they do not belong to the creamy layer.

Post-Wise Educational Qualification & Experience Requirements

Sl. No. Post Name Educational Qualification / Experience
1 Lower Division Clerk (LDC) Essential: 12th Class pass from a recognised Board Skill: A typing speed of 35 wpm in English OR 30 wpm in Hindi on computer (35 wpm and 30 wpm correspond to 10500 KDPH/9000 KDPH on an average of 5 key depressions for each word). Time allowed: 10 minutes.
2 Hindi Typist Essential: 12th Class pass from a recognised Board Skill: A typing speed of 30 wpm in Hindi on computer (30 wpm corresponds to 9000 KDPH on an average of 5 key depressions for each word). Time allowed: 10 minutes.
3 Civilian Mechanical Transport Driver – Ordinary Grade (CMTD) Essential: Matriculation pass or equivalent qualification from a recognised board or university Licence: Must hold a valid Civil Driving Licence for light and heavy vehicles Skill: Must possess professional skill in driving and knowledge of motor mechanism Experience: Minimum two (2) years' experience in driving motor vehicles

Important Notes on Eligibility:

  • Nationality: Eligible Indian Citizens only
  • Application forms must be typed in English/Hindi only
  • PwBD Typing Exemption: As per DoPT OM No. 14020/1/2014-Estt. (D) dated 22 April 2015, PwBD candidates who are otherwise qualified to hold clerical posts and are certified as being unable to type may be exempted from the typing test subject to furnishing Medical Certificate in prescribed format as Annexure-II

Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

For Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026, the age limit for all posts is 18 to 25 years. The crucial date for determining the age limit is the last date of receipt of application. Age relaxation is applicable to candidates of reserved categories as per the prevailing Government instructions. SC/ST/OBC candidates applying against unreserved posts are not entitled to any relaxation in age limit.

Category Age Limit / Relaxation
General (UR) 18 to 25 years
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 years relaxation (up to 28 years)
SC / ST 5 years relaxation (up to 30 years)
Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) - General 10 years relaxation (up to 35 years)
PwBD belonging to OBC 10 + 3 = 13 years relaxation (up to 38 years)
PwBD belonging to SC/ST 10 + 5 = 15 years relaxation (up to 40 years)
Ex-Servicemen (ESM) Full period of continuous service in Armed Forces (minimum 6 months) deducted from actual age; resultant age not to exceed prescribed maximum age by more than 3 years
Departmental Employees (UR) Up to 40 years
Departmental Employees (SC/ST) Up to 45 years

Note: The crucial date for determining the age limit is the last date of receipt of application.

Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 - Salary & Pay Scale

The selected candidates will be appointed in Group 'C' Civilian Posts with pay scale as per Level-2 of the Pay Matrix under 7th Central Pay Commission. The selected candidates will also be entitled to allowances such as Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), Transport Allowance (TA), and other benefits as per Government of India rules applicable to civilian employees of the Indian Air Force.

Post Name Pay Scale (7th CPC)
Lower Division Clerk (LDC) Level-2 as per Pay Matrix (7th CPC)
Hindi Typist Level-2 as per Pay Matrix (7th CPC)
Civilian Mechanical Transport Driver – Ordinary Grade (CMTD) Level-2 as per Pay Matrix (7th CPC)

Additional Benefits:

  • Dearness Allowance (DA) as per Government of India rules
  • House Rent Allowance (HRA) based on city classification
  • Transport Allowance (TA)
  • Other allowances as applicable to civilian employees of IAF
  • Contributory Provident Fund (CPF)
  • Gratuity
  • Leave entitlements as per rules
  • Medical facilities
  • All India Service Liability

Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026. However, candidates must attach a self-addressed envelope with stamps of Rs. 10/- pasted along with the application.

Category Application Fee
All Categories (General/OBC/SC/ST/EWS/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen) NIL (No application fee)
Self-addressed envelope with stamps Rs. 10/- (stamps to be pasted on self-addressed envelope)

Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection process for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 involves scrutiny of applications, written test, and skill/practical/physical test wherever applicable. All applications will be scrutinised in terms of age limit, minimum qualification, documents and certificates. Eligible candidates will be issued call letters for the written test. Merely fulfilling basic selection criteria does not automatically entitle a person to be called for test. Selected candidates will be subject to "All India Service Liability".

Selection Process Stages:

Stage Details
1. Scrutiny of Applications Pre-scrutiny in terms of age limit, minimum qualification, documents and certificates by the respective unit before calling candidates for the written test
2. Written Test 100% weightage; Question cum answer paper will be in English and Hindi; Simultaneous conduct of test for all categories
3. Skill / Practical / Physical Test Qualifying in nature; Required candidates shortlisted based on merit/category in written test will be called for this test

Written Test Syllabus (Post-Wise):

Post Name Syllabus / Subjects
Lower Division Clerk (LDC) / Hindi Typist
  • General Intelligence
  • English Language
  • Numerical Aptitude
  • General Awareness
Civilian Mechanical Transport Driver – Ordinary Grade (CMTD)
  • General Intelligence & Reasoning
  • Numerical Aptitude
  • General English
  • General Awareness
  • Trade/Post related questions

Important Notes on Selection:

  • Question cum answer paper will be in English and Hindi
  • There will be simultaneous conduct of test for all categories
  • The responsibility of deciding the category for which the candidate would like to appear will be the choice of the applicant himself
  • No separate exam will be conducted for candidates applying for more than one category if the exams are held on the same date
  • The centre for examination/skill/practical/physical test will be intimated to the candidate in due course and may be different from the place to which the application was sent

How to Apply for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026

The application process for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Eligible candidates can apply to any of the Air Force Stations of their choice subject to the vacancies and qualifications. The application as per Annexure-I (prescribed proforma given in the advertisement), duly supported with required documents, must reach the concerned Air Force Station as per choice within 30 days from the date of publication of this advertisement in Employment News/Rozgar Samachar (i.e., by approximately 01-06-2026).

Steps to Apply Offline:

  1. Step 1: Download Notification & Application Form - Download the Employment News notification PDF and extract the Application Form (Annexure-I) from the official notification
  2. Step 2: Fill Application Form - Download and fill the Application Form as per the prescribed Proforma (Annexure-I). The application form must be filled/typed in English or Hindi only
  3. Step 3: Affix Photograph - Affix a recent passport-size self-attested photograph on the application form. Also attach two additional passport-size photographs (same as affixed on the form)
  4. Step 4: Prepare Required Documents - Attach self-attested copies of all documents:
    • Educational qualification certificates (10th/12th/Diploma as applicable)
    • Age proof certificate (10th certificate/birth certificate)
    • Technical qualification certificates (if applicable)
    • Valid Civil Driving Licence (for CMTD post - for light and heavy vehicles)
    • Experience certificate (minimum 2 years for CMTD post)
    • Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD) certificate issued by competent authority (if applicable)
    • Caste Certificate issued by competent civil authorities for SC/ST/OBC/EWS candidates
    • OBC certificate stating non-creamy layer status (for OBC candidates seeking reservation)
    • Discharge book (self-attested photocopy for ex-servicemen)
    • EWS certificate valid for Financial Year 2026-2027 (issued on the basis of income for FY 2025-2026)
  5. Step 5: Attach Self-Addressed Envelope - Attach a self-addressed envelope with stamps of Rs. 10/- pasted. Address should be typed in English/Hindi
  6. Step 6: Prepare Envelope for Posting - Put all documents in an envelope. Mention clearly on the envelope: "APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF AND CATEGORY "
  7. Step 7: Send by Post - Send the complete application by post to the concerned Air Force Station/Unit's postal address (as mentioned in the official notification for the chosen station) within 30 days from the date of publication

Important Notes for Application:

  • Candidates intending to apply for more than one post must submit a separate application for each post
  • Applications received prior to the date of publication and after the closing date will not be entertained and will be rejected
  • IAF will not be held responsible for any postal delay
  • All documents must be self-attested
  • Application form must be duly typed in English/Hindi with a recent passport-size photograph

Documents Required with Application:

  • Duly filled Application Form (Annexure-I) typed in English/Hindi
  • Recent passport-size self-attested photograph affixed on application + 2 additional photographs
  • Self-attested copies of educational qualification certificates
  • Self-attested copy of age proof certificate
  • Valid Civil Driving Licence (for CMTD post)
  • Experience certificate (for CMTD post - minimum 2 years)
  • PwBD certificate (if applicable)
  • Caste certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS as applicable)
  • OBC non-creamy layer certificate (for OBC candidates)
  • Discharge book copy (for ex-servicemen)
  • Self-addressed envelope with Rs. 10/- stamps pasted

Send Application by Post to: The respective Postal Address of the concerned Air Force Station/Unit as mentioned in the official Employment News notification for the chosen station.

Note: Detailed station-wise postal addresses are available in the official Employment News notification PDF (Advt. No. 01/2026).

Important Instructions for Indian Air Force Group C Civilian Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Only Indian Citizens are eligible to apply
  • Age limit: 18 to 25 years (age relaxation as per category)
  • Crucial date for age and document validity: Last date of receipt of application
  • SC/ST/OBC candidates applying against unreserved posts are not entitled to any relaxation in age limit, experience, etc.
  • OBC candidates seeking reservation must submit certificate stating they do not belong to creamy layer and their caste should be listed under Central List of OBCs
  • EWS candidates must ensure that the Income & Asset Certificate is valid for Financial Year 2026-2027 (issued on the basis of income for FY 2025-2026)
  • PwBD candidates with temporary disability (falling under "likely to improve" category) as per Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment OM No. 18-25/2024-Policy dated 17 Dec 2025 are not eligible for reservation. Only "progressive, non-progressive or not likely to improve" PwBD candidates are eligible for reservation
  • PwBD Typing Exemption: As per DoPT OM No. 14020/1/2014-Estt. (D) dated 22 April 2015, PwBD candidates certified as unable to type may be exempted from typing test subject to Medical Certificate (Annexure-II)
  • The option for scribe to PwBD candidates will be applicable as per DoPT OM No. 29-6/2019-DD-III dated 10 Aug 2022
  • Application must be submitted offline by post only within 30 days from publication date (by approx. 01-06-2026)
  • Application form must be filled/typed in English or Hindi only
  • Applications received before publication date or after closing date will be rejected
  • IAF will not be held responsible for any postal delay
  • Candidates can apply to any Air Force Station of their choice subject to vacancies and qualifications
  • Candidates intending to apply for more than one post must submit separate applications for each post
  • Mention clearly on envelope: "APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF AND CATEGORY "
  • All documents must be self-attested
  • Attach self-addressed envelope with Rs. 10/- stamps pasted
  • No application fee mentioned
  • Selection through: Scrutiny + Written Test (100% weightage) + Skill/Practical/Physical Test (qualifying)
  • Written test question paper will be in English and Hindi
  • Simultaneous conduct of test for all categories - no separate exam for multiple category applicants on same date
  • The centre for examination may be different from the place to which application was sent
  • No TA/DA will be paid to attend written test/skill/practical/physical test
  • Candidates must bring original certificates at the time of skill/practical/physical test
  • Merely fulfilling basic selection criteria does not automatically entitle a person to be called for test
  • The Air Officer Commanding/Station Commander/Commanding Officer has the right to reject any application without assigning reason
  • The Air Officer Commanding/Station Commander/Commanding Officer has the right to change number of vacancies/reservation status at any time before selection
  • Selected candidates will be subject to "All India Service Liability"

How to Apply for Sarkari Job Online 2026

  1. Find the right Sarkari Job: Use the vacancy table or sector links above on OnlyJobs. Filter by your qualification — 10th, 12th, Graduate, or Engineering. Check the last date and eligibility carefully.

  2. Read the official notification: Click on the job listing to open the official notification PDF. Read all eligibility conditions — age limit, educational qualification, experience, category relaxations.

  3. Visit the official recruitment website: Never apply through third-party sites. Use the direct official link provided on OnlyJobs. Look for "Apply Online" or "Register" on the official portal.

  4. Register / Create account: Sign up using your valid email ID and active mobile number. Keep your Aadhaar, bank account details, and email accessible.

  5. Fill the application form: Enter personal details, educational qualifications, category (General/OBC/SC/ST/EWS), address, and other required information accurately.

  6. Upload documents: Scan and upload recent passport-size photograph, signature, 10th certificate (for DOB proof), educational certificates, caste certificate (if applicable). Check file size and format (JPG/PDF as specified).

  7. Pay application fee: Pay via Net Banking, UPI, Debit/Credit Card as applicable. Some categories (SC/ST/PwD/Women) may be exempted from fee. Keep the payment receipt.

  8. Submit and save confirmation: Review all details before final submission. After submitting, download the application printout / PDF confirmation with your registration number. Store it safely for admit card, exam, and future reference.

Why Sarkari Job? Benefits of Government Employment in India

Job Security
Permanent employment — cannot be terminated without due process. Lifelong career stability.
7th Pay Commission Salary
Fixed salary + DA, HRA, TA allowances. DA revised every 6 months. Regular pay revisions.
Medical Benefits
Free or subsidised medical treatment for employee and family under CGHS / state health schemes.
Housing Benefits
Government quarters (where available) or HRA (8–27% of basic pay). No private rent worries.
Pension (NPS / OPS)
Post-retirement monthly pension under NPS or OPS (state-specific). Financial security after service.
Work-Life Balance
Fixed working hours. Paid casual, medical, earned leave. National and state holidays. No overtime culture.
Career Growth
Regular promotions through DPC, ACR-based upgrades, MACP benefits (3 financial upgrades guaranteed).
Children's Education Allowance
Reimbursement of children's school fees (₹2,812/month per child up to 2 children, revised periodically).

Frequently Asked Questions – Sarkari Job 2026

What is Sarkari Job (सरकारी नौकरी)?

Sarkari Job (सरकारी नौकरी) refers to government employment in India — jobs offered by central government departments, state governments, public sector undertakings (PSUs), banks, railways, defence forces, and other government-funded organisations. These jobs offer permanent employment, fixed salary as per 7th Pay Commission, pension, medical benefits, and unmatched job security.

How to find Sarkari Job vacancy 2026 online?

To find online Sarkari Job vacancies in 2026: (1) Visit OnlyJobs daily for updated notifications. (2) Filter by your qualification — 10th, 12th, Graduate, PG. (3) Filter by sector — Railway, Banking, SSC, Defence, State PSC, Teaching. (4) Check last dates carefully. (5) Apply through the official department website using the direct link provided. Enable push notifications on OnlyJobs for instant alerts.

What Sarkari Job can I get after 10th pass?

After 10th pass, you can apply for: Railway Group D (RRB), Indian Army Soldier posts, Postal Mail Guard, SSC MTS / Havaldar, Constable GD, Anganwadi Worker/Helper, ITI Apprentice in PSUs (IOCL, HPCL, NTPC), MCL / Coal India posts, and various state government peon/chowkidar posts. Thousands of 10th pass Sarkari Job vacancies open every year.

What is the salary in Sarkari Job 2026?

Sarkari Job salary in 2026 follows the 7th Pay Commission: Group D / MTS: ₹22,000–₹26,000/month. Clerk / Group C: ₹32,000–₹48,000/month. Officer Grade (SSC CGL, Bank PO): ₹47,000–₹85,000/month. IAS/IPS (UPSC): ₹56,100–₹1,44,200 basic pay + DA, HRA, TA, medical and other allowances. State government salaries vary by state pay commission.

Which Bharat Sarkari Job has the most vacancies in 2026?

The largest Bharat Sarkari Job recruitments in 2026 include: Indian Army Agniveer (40,000+ posts), RRB Group D (22,000+ posts), SSC CGL (14,582 posts), SSC MTS (10,000+ posts), UP Police Constable (multiple), Bihar Police (multiple), IBPS Clerk (8,000+ posts), and various state PSC recruitments. Total active sarkari vacancies in India exceed 52,920 as of March 2026.

What is the best website to find Sarkari Job in India?

OnlyJobs is India's most trusted portal for Sarkari Job notifications since 2011, serving over 10 million users. Official direct sources include: ssc.nic.in (SSC), indianrailways.gov.in (Railways), upsc.gov.in (UPSC), ibps.in (Banking), and respective state PSC websites. OnlyJobs aggregates all official notifications in one place with direct apply links.

How to apply for Sarkari Job online in 2026?

To apply for Sarkari Job online: (1) Read official notification PDF. (2) Check eligibility. (3) Visit official recruitment website. (4) Register with email/mobile. (5) Fill application form. (6) Upload photo, signature, and certificates. (7) Pay fee via Net Banking/UPI/Debit card. (8) Submit and lication confirmation. Save the registration number for admit card and future reference.

What are the benefits of Sarkari Job in India?

Key benefits: (1) Lifelong job security. (2) 7th Pay Commission salary + DA revised biannually. (3) HRA (8–27% of basic). (4) Medical benefits (CGHS). (5) Pension under NPS/OPS. (6) Paid leave — casual, earned, medical. (7) Gratuity after 5 years. (8) Children's education allowance. (9) Fixed working hours and work-life balance. (10) Prestige and social recognition in Indian society.

What is the age limit for Sarkari Job?

Age limits vary by post: Group D (18–25 years), SSC CGL (18–32 years), Bank PO (20–30 years), UPSC Civil Services (21–32 years), Defence Agniveer (17.5–23 years). Age relaxations: SC/ST — 5 years, OBC — 3 years, PwD — 10 years, Ex-Servicemen — 3 years (general), Government servants — up to 5 years. Always verify in the official notification for each post.

What is Bharat Sarkari Job?

Bharat Sarkari Job means government job opportunities across the entire country of India (Bharat) — spanning central and state government vacancies across all 28 states and 8 union territories. The term emphasises pan-India coverage. OnlyJobs covers all Bharat Sarkari Job notifications from UPSC, SSC, Railways, Banking, Defence, state PSCs, and all other government departments.

All vacancy data is verified against official websites before listing. OnlyJobs has been India's trusted government job portal since 2011, serving 10+ million users annually. About OnlyJobs 2026

OnlyJobs (Government Jobs) are highly sought-after employment opportunities in India. These positions offer job security, good salary packages, allowances, and retirement benefits. Our platform provides comprehensive information about all types of government vacancies including:

  • Central Government Jobs: UPSC, SSC, Railway, Banking, Defence, PSUs
  • State Government Jobs: State PSCs, Police, Teachers, Healthcare workers
  • Qualification-based Jobs: 10th Pass, 12th Pass, Graduate, Post Graduate, Engineering
  • Category-wise Jobs: General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, Ex-Servicemen, PwD

Frequently Asked Questions - OnlyJobs 2026

Q1: What is the eligibility for OnlyJobs?

Eligibility varies by position. Generally, candidates need to be Indian citizens aged 18-35 years (with age relaxation for reserved categories). Educational qualifications range from 10th pass to post-graduation depending on the job.

Q2: How to prepare for Government Job exams?

Preparation includes understanding the exam pattern, studying from standard books, practicing previous year papers, taking mock tests, and staying updated with current affairs. Focus on subjects like General Knowledge, Reasoning, Quantitative Aptitude, and English.

Q3: Which are the best Government Jobs in 2026?

Top government jobs include IAS/IPS (UPSC), Bank PO, SSC CGL, Railway Group A & B, Defence Services, PSU Jobs, State PCS, and Teaching positions. These offer excellent career growth, job security, and benefits.

Q4: What is the application process for OnlyJobs?

The process typically involves: 1) Online registration on the official website, 2) Filling application form, 3) Uploading documents (photo, signature, certificates), 4) Payment of application fee, 5) Downloading admit card, 6) Appearing for examination, 7) Document verification if selected.

Q5: How often are new OnlyJobs notifications released?

New government job notifications are released daily. Major recruitments like UPSC, SSC, IBPS have annual calendars, while state governments and PSUs release notifications throughout the year. We update our portal daily with 700+ active job listings.

WCD Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Apply Online wcd.nic.in

WCD Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 – Apply online for the latest Anganwadi Worker, Anganwadi Helper and Supervisor vacancies through the official WCD/ICDS portals such as wcd.nic.in and state ICDS portals. Candidates can check state-wise and district-wise Anganwadi vacancy lists, eligibility, qualifications, age limit, salary, and online application dates, and download the Anganwadi Application Form 2026. Start your career in Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS) and stay updated with the latest Anganwadi job notifications from all major states including Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, Uttar Pradesh, Andhra Pradesh, Maharashtra, Bihar and more.

Anganwadi Worker Salary / Honorarium 2026

Anganwadi Workers and Helpers receive a monthly honorarium (not a salary), which includes a Central Government component and an additional State Government component. The table below shows the total honorarium per month for key states in 2026.

Selection Process for Anganwadi Recruitment 2026

There is no written examination for Anganwadi Worker and Helper posts. Selection is merit-based on academic qualifications. For Supervisor and CDPO posts, a written exam or interview may be conducted.

How to Apply for Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Online

  • Visit the official portal: Go to your state's official WCD / ICDS website or the direct link provided in the vacancy table above. For central information, visit wcd.nic.in.
  • Find the recruitment notification: Click on the "Recruitment" or "Anganwadi Recruitment 2026" section.
  • Download and read the notification: Download and read the official notification PDF carefully before applying.
  • Register / Login: Create a new account using your mobile number and Aadhaar. If already registered, log in with your credentials.
  • Fill the application form: Enter personal details, educational qualification, address, and select your preferred district/ward. Ensure you apply only for a ward where you are a permanent resident.
  • Upload documents: Upload scanned copies of your passport-size photograph, signature, 10th/12th marksheet, Aadhaar card, and any caste/domicile certificate if required.
  • Review and submit: Check all entries carefully before final submission. Download and print the application confirmation / acknowledgement slip for your records.

Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 – FAQ's

How to apply for Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 online?

Visit your state's official WCD / ICDS portal (link provided in table above). Register with mobile & Aadhaar, fill the application form, upload documents (photo, 10th certificate, Aadhaar, domicile), and submit before the last date. Print the application acknowledgement slip after submission.

What is the eligibility for Anganwadi Worker 2026?

Candidates must have passed 10th or 12th standard from a recognized board. Age limit is 18–35 years (varies by state). Must be a permanent resident of the ward/village for which vacancy exists. Only female candidates are eligible for Worker and Helper posts.

What is the salary of Anganwadi Worker in 2026?

Anganwadi Worker receives a monthly honorarium of ₹10,000–₹20,000 depending on the state (Karnataka and TN are highest at ~₹14,000). Anganwadi Helper gets ₹5,000–₹7,000/month. The Central Government pays ₹4,500/month as base honorarium, and states add their own component on top.

Is there a written exam for Anganwadi jobs?

No, there is no written examination for Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper posts. Selection is purely merit-based on academic qualification marks (10th / 12th percentage). For Supervisor / CDPO posts, a written exam or interview may be conducted depending on the state.

What is the age limit for Anganwadi Helper?

Age limit is 18 to 35 years as of 1st January 2026 in most states. SC/ST candidates get 5 years relaxation (maximum age 40). OBC candidates get 3 years relaxation (maximum age 38). PwD candidates get additional relaxation as per state rules.

What documents are required for Anganwadi job application?

Required documents: Aadhaar card, 10th/12th marksheet and certificate, domicile/residence certificate, caste certificate (SC/ST/OBC), passport-size photograph, scanned signature, and EWS/PwD certificate if applicable. Graduation certificate is needed for Supervisor post applications.

What is ICDS recruitment 2026?

ICDS stands for Integrated Child Development Services - the government programme under which Anganwadi centres operate nationwide. ICDS recruitment 2026 refers to hiring of Anganwadi Workers, Helpers, Supervisors, and CDPOs by state WCD departments under the Ministry of Women & Child Development (wcd.nic.in).

Is Anganwadi Worker a permanent government job?

Anganwadi Workers and Helpers are honorary workers, not regular government employees. They receive a fixed monthly honorarium (not salary) and are entitled to benefits like ESI, health insurance, and maternity benefits. Supervisors and CDPOs are regular government employees in most states and receive full pay & grade pay.

Can I apply for Anganwadi job from a different district?

No. Anganwadi Workers and Helpers must be permanent residents of the same ward/village/district where the vacancy exists. A domicile or residence certificate is mandatory. Applications from outside the specified locality are rejected. For Supervisor/CDPO posts, the same district residency rule generally applies.

Forest Department Posts List

Forest departments work with a clear hierarchy from senior Indian Forest Service officers to field-level staff like Forest Guard and Forest Watcher. Understanding these posts helps candidates know growth opportunities and career progression in forest services.

  • Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (PCCF) / Head of Forest Force
  • Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (APCCF) / Additional Chief Conservator of Forests
  • Chief Conservator of Forests (CCF)
  • Conservator of Forests (CF)
  • Deputy Conservator of Forests (DCF) / Divisional Forest Officer (DFO)
  • Assistant Conservator of Forests (ACF)
  • Forest Range Officer (FRO) / Range Forest Officer (RFO)
  • Deputy Forest Ranger / Forest Inspector
  • Section Forest Officer / Forester / Van Daroga
  • Beat Forest Officer / Beat Guard / Forester Grade I
  • Forest Guard / Van Rakshak
  • Forest Watcher / Forest Worker / Plantation Worker
  • Forest Ranger (in states where used separately)
  • Field Guard

Most forest department recruitment notifications on this page focus on Forest Guard, Forester, Forest Range Officer, Field Guard and similar Group B, C and D posts.

Eligibility for Forest Department Jobs

Eligibility for forest department jobs depends on the post, state and recruitment authority. Below is a general idea of qualification and age for popular posts like Forest Guard, Forester and Forest Range Officer. Candidates should always check the official notification for detailed eligibility criteria.

Education Qualification for Forest Guard, Forester, Ranger

  • Forest Guard / Field Guard / Forest Watcher / Beat Guard: Usually 10th pass or 12th pass from a recognized board, knowledge of local language, and basic physical standards as per state rules.
  • Forester / Section Forest Officer / Deputy Forest Ranger: Generally 12th pass or graduate in any stream or science-related subjects, with physical standards and sometimes driving or technical skills depending on the post.
  • Forest Range Officer (RFO) / Forest Ranger / ACF: Normally graduate degree in Science, Agriculture, Forestry, Environmental Science, Engineering or related disciplines, with higher physical standards and sometimes a competitive exam similar to state PCS level.
  • IFS / Indian Forest Service and senior posts (DCF, CF, CCF, PCCF): Filled through UPSC Indian Forest Service Examination and promotions, requiring a graduate degree and all-India competitive selection.

Age Limit & Relaxation

  • Forest Guard / Forester / Field Guard: Minimum age is usually 18 years and maximum age is around 27–30 years, with age relaxation for SC, ST, OBC, EWS, Ex-servicemen and other categories as per government rules.
  • Forest Range Officer / ACF and higher competitive posts: Age limit often ranges from 21 to 32 years (varies by recruitment), with relaxations for reserved categories.
  • Exact age limit, cut-off date and relaxation details always depend on the particular notification, so candidates should verify from the official advertisement before applying.

Forest Department Jobs Salary Overview

Forest department salary depends on the post, pay level, state and allowances. Senior officers under Indian Forest Service receive higher pay levels, while Forest Guard, Forester and similar posts fall under state government pay matrices.

Post Pay Level Basic Pay Gross Salary (Approx) Category

Forester / Forest Sub-Inspector Level 6 ₹35,400 ₹45,000 – ₹56,000 Group C
Forest Beat Officer / Beat Guard / Junior Ranger Level 4 ₹25,500 ₹33,000 – ₹42,000 Group C
Forest Range Officer (FRO) / Ranger Level 10 ₹56,100 ₹70,000 – ₹90,000 Group B

Selection Process & Exam Pattern

The selection process for Forest Department Jobs 2026 typically includes written examinations, physical tests and document verification. Some posts also conduct medical examination and walking tests due to the demanding nature of field duties.

Written Exam, PET/PST & Document Verification

  • Written Exam: Most Forest Guard, Forester and Forest Range Officer recruitments start with a written exam based on objective-type questions (MCQs).
  • PET / PST (Physical Efficiency Test / Physical Standard Test): Candidates who qualify written exam are called for running, walking test, height, chest measurement and other physical parameters as per post and gender.
  • Document Verification: Shortlisted candidates must produce original certificates of age, qualification, caste, residence, sports/NCC and other documents mentioned in the notification.
  • Medical Examination: Many forest posts require medical fitness to ensure candidates can perform field duties in forests, wildlife areas and difficult terrain.

Syllabus Highlights for Forest Guard & Ranger

Typical syllabus for written exam may include:

  • General Knowledge & Current Affairs (national, state-level, environment and forest-related topics)
  • General Hindi / English or regional language (grammar, comprehension, vocabulary)
  • General Mathematics / Quantitative Aptitude (up to 10th or 12th level)
  • General Science and Environmental Studies (forest, wildlife, biodiversity, conservation, climate, basic biology)
  • Reasoning Ability (logical and analytical reasoning)

Exact subject-wise marks, number of questions, negative marking and exam duration will be given in the respective forest department notification.

How to Apply for Forest Department Jobs 2026

Most Forest Department Jobs 2026 applications are accepted either online through official websites or offline via prescribed application forms. Candidates should carefully read the official notification before filling the form.

Online Application Process

  1. Visit the official website of the recruiting body (State Forest Department, State PSC, Staff Selection Board or other government portal).
  2. Find the latest link for Forest Guard / Forester / Forest Range Officer / other forest posts and open the detailed advertisement.
  3. Complete the registration process with basic details like name, mobile number, email ID and verify using OTP if required.
  4. Fill the online application form with personal, educational, address and category information exactly as per documents.
  5. Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature and other certificates in the prescribed format and size.
  6. Pay the application fee online through Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card or UPI as per your convenience.
  7. Finally, submit the form and take a printout or PDF of the submitted application and payment receipt for future reference.

Documents Required & Application Fee

  • Recent passport size photograph and signature (scanned)
  • Class 10th and 12th mark sheets and certificates
  • Degree / Diploma certificates for graduate-level posts
  • Caste / Category certificate (SC, ST, OBC, EWS, etc.)
  • Domicile / Residence certificate if required by the state
  • NCC, Sports, Ex-serviceman and other quota certificates if applicable
  • Valid ID proof (Aadhaar Card, PAN, Voter ID, Driving Licence, Passport, etc.)

Why Choose Forest Department Jobs?

Forest department jobs are popular among candidates who love nature, wildlife and field work. These jobs offer job security, government benefits and a chance to work in forest conservation, wildlife protection, eco-tourism and community development.

  • Stable government job with regular salary, pension/NPS and allowances
  • Opportunity to work in forests, wildlife sanctuaries, national parks and protected areas
  • Contribution to environment protection, afforestation and biodiversity conservation

WAPCOS Limited Recruitment 2026: Get the latest WAPCOS recruitment notification 2026 for 159 Expert/Engineer vacancies on Project Term Basis for work relating to various Projects under RDSS (Revamped Distribution Sector Scheme). The application (CV submission) process is open now and the last date to apply is 26th May 2026. Find WAPCOS vacancies on the official website www.wapcos.co.in. You can also get OnlyJobs of "Upcoming WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for WAPCOS RDSS Recruitment 2026 apply (CV submission) from the WAPCOS career page.

FOLLOW US

WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

WAPCOS Limited has officially released Advertisement No. WAP/EXPT/TPI-RDSS/2026-27/01 dated 11/05/2026 for engagement of Experts on Project Term Basis for work relating to various Projects under RDSS (Revamped Distribution Sector Scheme). The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility, experience requirements, terms & conditions, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full notification before submitting their CV. The notification PDF is available on the official WAPCOS website.

  • Download WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organization Name WAPCOS Limited (A Government of India Undertaking), ISO 9001:2015, Mini Ratna-I
Advertisement No. WAP/EXPT/TPI-RDSS/2026-27/01 dated 11/05/2026
Post Names Assistant Project Manager, Team Leader, Smart Metering Expert, Material Quality Expert, SCADA Expert, Cloud Infrastructure Expert, Cyber Security Expert, Field Engineer, Field Supervisor
Department / Scheme RDSS (Revamped Distribution Sector Scheme) – TPI Projects
Nature of Engagement Project Term Basis (Purely Temporary)
Total Vacancies 159 (variable as per project requirement)
Pay Scale Salary commensurate with qualification & experience; to be discussed at interview
Application Mode CV submission via email only ([email protected])
Selection Mode Shortlisting + Interview
Project Locations Haryana, Chhattisgarh, Andhra Pradesh, Puducherry, Madhya Pradesh, Arunachal Pradesh, Uttar Pradesh, and Nagaland
Official Website https://www.wapcos.co.in

WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Date of Advertisement 11/05/2026
Opening of Application (CV Submission) 11-05-2026
Last Date for CV Submission (Email) 26-05-2026
Age and Experience Calculated As On 30-04-2026
Interview Date To be notified separately
Place of Posting To be finalized at the time of interview

WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 159 vacancies (variable as per project requirement) have been announced across 9 posts for work under the RDSS scheme. Posts are distributed across expert/managerial and field-level positions in the power distribution sector.

Sl. No. Name of Post No. of Posts
1 Assistant Project Manager 3
2 Team Leader 9
3 Smart Metering Expert 5
4 Material Quality Expert 1
5 SCADA Expert 2
6 Cloud Infrastructure Expert 1
7 Cyber Security Expert 1
8 Field Engineer 46
9 Field Supervisor 91
Total 159

WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill the qualification and experience requirements as on 30-04-2026. The educational qualification must be from a recognized university/institution. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWBMD candidates shall be applicable as per Government rules. Applications submitted in formats other than the WAPCOS prescribed proforma will be rejected. Self-attested photocopies of all supporting documents (Date of Birth, Qualification, Experience, Category proof) must accompany the application.

Post-wise Educational Qualification and Experience

Post Qualification Experience Required

RCFL Recruitment 2026: Get the latest RCFL recruitment notification 2026 for 188 Operator (Chemical) Trainee vacancies under the Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited (RCFL), a Mini Ratna Category-I Public Sector Undertaking. The online application process starts on 11th April 2026 and the last date to apply online is 13th May 2026. Find RCFL Operator Trainee vacancies at various locations on the official website www.rcfltd.com. You can also get OnlyJobs of "Upcoming RCFL Operator Trainee Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for RCFL Recruitment 2026 apply online from the RCFL career page.

FOLLOW US

RCFL Operator Trainee Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited (RCFL) has officially released Advertisement No. 17022026 dated 11-04-2026 for recruitment to 188 posts of Operator (Chemical) Trainee across various locations. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility, selection process, examination pattern, salary, training details, application instructions, and category-wise reservation. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full notification before applying online. The notification PDF is available on the official RCFL website and applications are accepted through IBPS portal only.

  • Download RCFL Operator Trainee Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

RCFL Operator Trainee Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organization Name Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited (RCFL), a Mini Ratna Category-I PSU
Advertisement No. 17022026 dated 11-04-2026
Post Name Operator (Chemical) Trainee
Department Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited
Total Vacancies 188 Posts
Training Stipend Rs. 22,000/- per month (consolidated, for 6 months training period)
Pay Scale (After Training) Grade II-(A6): Rs. 22,000 - 60,000 (Total Gross approx. Rs. 47,800/-)
Application Mode Online only (through IBPS portal)
Selection Mode Computer Based Online Test + Skill Test (Qualifying) + Document Scrutiny
Nature of Employment 6 months training + Regular absorption in Grade II-(A6) after successful training completion
Official Website https://www.rcfltd.com

RCFL Operator Trainee Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Date of Notification 11-04-2026
Start Date for Online Application 11-04-2026
Last Date for Online Application Submission 13-05-2026
Crucial Date for Age & Qualification 01-02-2026
